changelog.title: Примечания к выпуску протокола AIP
changelog.subtitle: Техническая документация о текущих разработках и будущих прогнозах в системе ProcureOS AIP.
changelog.footerNote: ProcureOS — это автономная экосистема, соответствующая стандартам AIP.

changelog.searchPlaceholder: Поиск по сообщению коммита или версии...

AIP-106.title: Глобальные расчеты и уровень Escrow
AIP-106.description: Полная интеграция трансграничных платежей и безопасной торговли (Escrow) в протокол AIP.
AIP-106.item2: ProcureOS Escrow: система платежей на базе смарт-контрактов с подтверждением доставки.
AIP-106.item3: Панель финансирования поставщиков и управления выплатами.

AIP-105.title: ProcureAI Insight и прогнозирование
AIP-105.description: Предварительное обнаружение рыночных тенденций и рисков цепочки поставок с помощью ИИ.
AIP-105.item1: Прогнозный сорсинг: резервирование мощностей поставщиков до возникновения спроса.
AIP-105.item2: Анализ рыночных тенденций и оповещения о динамических колебаниях цен.

AIP-104.title: Enterprise Connect и интеграция с ERP
AIP-104.description: Бесшовная синхронизация данных ProcureOS с существующими корпоративными ERP-системами.
AIP-104.item1: Готовые коннекторы данных для SAP, Oracle и Microsoft Dynamics.
AIP-104.item2: Иерархический механизм утверждения и интеграция контроля корпоративного бюджета.
AIP-104.item3: Поддержка единого входа (SSO) и управления идентификацией (IAM).

AIP-103_6.title: Корпоративная отчетность и финансовая прозрачность
AIP-103_6.description: Обеспечена профессиональная отчетность по закупкам на операционном и финансовом уровнях.
AIP-103_6.item1: Профессиональный движок экспорта в Excel (.xlsx) и стилизованные таблицы.
AIP-103_6.item2: В отчеты добавлен показатель «Анализ потенциальной экономии».
AIP-103_6.item3: Расширенная фильтрация данных и инфраструктура отчетности по датам.
AIP-103_6.item4: Время загрузки дашборда ускорено на 70% благодаря SWR.
AIP-103_6.item5: Оптимизация запросов завершена с помощью индексации GIN и B-Tree.

AIP-103_5.title: Performance Engine и асинхронная архитектура
AIP-103_5.description: Основная инфраструктура ProcureOS переведена на асинхронную структуру для работы с интенсивным трафиком.
AIP-103_5.item1: Генерация AI-эмбеддингов вынесена в слой воркеров для ускорения системы.
AIP-103_5.item2: Запущена инфраструктура Debounced Search для поиска на маркетплейсе.
AIP-103_5.item3: Форматы местоположения и адресов стандартизированы во всех модулях.

AIP-103.title: Zero-Trust и семантическое соответствие
AIP-103.description: Базовая стабилизация движка безопасности данных и ИИ-подбора.
AIP-103.item1: Изоляция Zero-Trust обеспечена с помощью Supabase RLS.
AIP-103.item2: Задержка движка семантического соответствия снижена до уровня менее 450 мс.

AIP-102.title: Интеллектуальное управление каталогами
AIP-102.description: Цифровизация каталогов поставщиков и данных о продукции.
AIP-102.item1: Система векторного поиска товаров и каталогизации.

faq.title: Часто задаваемые вопросы
faq.subtitle: Все, что вам нужно знать об автономной экосистеме закупок ProcureOS.

questions.q1: Как создать запрос на покупку через ProcureOS?
questions.a1: Вы можете написать о своих потребностях на естественном языке, нажав кнопку 'Создать запрос' на главной странице.
questions.a2: Процесс проверки поставщиков ProcureOS основан на трехэтапном механизме аудита.
questions.a3: На данном этапе платежи осуществляются напрямую через существующие коммерческие соглашения.
questions.q4: Могу ли я связаться с мировыми поставщиками?
questions.a4: Да, сеть ProcureOS охватывает тысячи поставщиков как на местном, так и на мировом уровне.

howItWorks.title: Откройте для себя систему.
howItWorks.subtitle: Забудьте о традиционных процессах закупок. Превратите свою цепочку поставок в автономную операционную систему с помощью протокола AIP-103+.

step1.title: Умный поиск и обнаружение

step2.title: Автономное создание RFQ
step2.desc: При создании запроса система автоматически анализирует технические детали.

step3.title: Переговоры в реальном времени
step3.desc: Изучайте предложения поставщиков на единой панели.

step4.title: Безопасное одобрение и мониторинг

q1.title: Может ли быть лучше, чем ваши нынешние поставщики?
q1.desc: Наш ИИ-движок найдет для вас скрытых гигантов мирового рынка.

q2.title: Хотите проверить рыночные цены?

terms.title: Terms of Service & User Agreement
terms.intro: Welcome to ProcureOS. These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your access to and use of the ProcureOS platform, including our website, APIs, and autonomous procurement engine (collectively, the 'Services'). By using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By creating an account or accessing the ProcureOS platform, you represent that you have the authority to bind yourself or the legal entity you represent to these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not access or use our Services.

sections.title: 2. Service Description & AIP Protocol
sections.content: ProcureOS provides an autonomous procurement infrastructure leveraging the AIP-103+ protocol to match buyers with suppliers. We act as a technology provider and do not become a party to any commercial contracts formed between users unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: 3. User Responsibilities & Account Security
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. Any activity occurring under your account is your responsibility. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.content: All content, features, and functionality on the ProcureOS platform, including but not limited to the AIP-103 protocol logic, algorithms, and UI design, are the exclusive property of ProcureOS and are protected by international copyright and trademark laws.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Activities
sections.content: Users are prohibited from: (a) attempting to bypass platform security; (b) using automated systems to scrape data without authorization; (c) submitting fraudulent RFQs or offers; (d) infringing on the intellectual property of others.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ProcureOS shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Services, including but not limited to loss of profits or business interruptions.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Turkey. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Istanbul.

privacy.title: Global Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ProcureOS, we take your data privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal and corporate information in compliance with global standards including GDPR and KVKK.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information provided during registration (name, email, company details), operational data (RFQs, offers, transaction history), and technical metadata (IP address, browser type) to optimize our autonomous engine.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Data is used to: (a) facilitate the matching process between buyers and suppliers; (b) improve the AIP-103 matching algorithms; (c) ensure platform security; (d) communicate critical system updates.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing & Third Parties
sections.content: We do not sell your personal data. Information is shared with counterparties (suppliers or buyers) only as necessary to facilitate the procurement process. We may use third-party sub-processors for infrastructure and analytics.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard technical and organizational measures, including end-to-end encryption and strict RLS (Row Level Security) protocols, to protect your data from unauthorized access.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also object to certain processing activities. Requests can be submitted via our support channel or privacy dashboard.

cookies.title: Cookie & Tracking Policy
cookies.intro: ProcureOS uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience and analyze platform performance.

sections.title: 1. What are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and keep your session secure.

sections.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
sections.content: We use: (a) Essential Cookies for core platform functionality; (b) Analytical Cookies to understand usage patterns; (c) Preference Cookies to remember your language and region settings.

sections.title: 3. Managing Preferences
sections.content: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling essential cookies may limit your ability to use certain features of the platform.

ccpa.title: CCPA Privacy Notice (California)
ccpa.intro: This notice supplements our Global Privacy Policy and applies specifically to residents of the State of California. It describes our information practices and your rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act of 2018 ('CCPA').

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: In the preceding 12 months, we have collected the following categories of personal information: Identifiers (name, email, IP address), Commercial information (transaction history), and Professional/Employment information.

sections.title: 2. Your Rights Under CCPA
sections.content: As a California resident, you have the right to: (a) Request to know what personal information we collect and how we use it; (b) Request the deletion of your personal information; (c) Opt-out of the sale of your personal information (note: ProcureOS does not sell personal information).

sections.title: 3. Exercising Your Rights
sections.content: To exercise your rights, please submit a request via our specialized privacy dashboard or email us at privacy@procure-os.com. We will verify your request before processing it.

subscription.title: Master Subscription Agreement
subscription.intro: This Master Subscription Agreement ('Agreement') governs the purchase and use of ProcureOS corporate subscription plans.

sections.title: 1. Subscription Services
sections.content: ProcureOS grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable right to access and use the platform according to the selected tier and seat count specified in your Order Form.

sections.title: 2. Fees & Payment
sections.content: Subscription fees are billed in advance according to the billing cycle selected (Monthly/Annually). Failure to pay fees may result in suspension of service.

sections.title: 3. Term & Termination
sections.content: This Agreement remains in effect until the subscription expires or is terminated. Either party may terminate for material breach with 30 days' written notice.

sections.title: 4. Service Level Agreement (SLA)
sections.content: ProcureOS aims for 99.9% uptime. Corporate plans include dedicated support and priority resolution for critical system interruptions.
